case_title: WAN CHUN CHIEN VS. ERIK SEIDLER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2019 - CONTINUED TO APR-22-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 TO BE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE ROBERTSON. JUDGE PRO TEM MANI SHEIK RECUSES HIMSELF. JUDGE PRO TEM: MANI SHEIK; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,232.60 FILED BY CHIEN, WAN CHUN AS TO DEFENDANT SEIDLER, ERIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JAN-16-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SEIDLER, ERIK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-22-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE - JURISDICTION IN SAN MATEO COUNTY. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 04/08/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-08-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF WAN CHUN CHIEN. DEFENDANT ERIK SEIDLER DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF HAS NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED AT THE TIME OF HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEN, WAN CHUN
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 4/8/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 4/23/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
